name: Yuan Jing
description: The Divine Foresight, one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Although his appearance may be one of indolence, he is more meticulous than seemingly meets the eye. He does not consider saving a situation from the brink of disaster to be a show of wisdom, and is thus fastidious with routine affairs to avoid any potential problems. name: Aku
description: Aku was cast out of her village as a sacrifice to the Devil King Greol; however, as she is being chased through the forest by Greol, she comes to a clearing where she encounters a mysterious man. This man defeats the Devil King with a single knife, causing Aku to become frightened for her life. The man assures her that she has nothing to worry, he introduces himself as Hakuto Kunai. description: Nicknamed "Idol" by the Day Class girls. Along with his cousin Akatsuki Kain, Hanabusa Aido is known among the Night Class as "Kaname-sama's right hand," and he has a fierce admiration for Kaname. He possesses an upper-class vampire ability to control ice. He knows that Zero is a vampire, but keeps quiet about it. Heero Yuy is nothing more than his code name, however, named for the fallen Colony leader who's assassination the Gundam Pilots were supposed to avenge. description: __Height:__ 158 cm A candidate for the student council vice-president. She has blue hair and large breasts. She always speaks in feminine and polite speech.

name: Hime
description: __Position:__ Princess, Commander of The Third Legion of The Imperial Army Eldest daughter of the king, and commander of The Third Legion of The Imperial Army. While The Third Legion is only considered average, Princess herself would outskill even the top ranks of The First Legion in one-on-one combat, or so they say. Has a younger sister. Her special skills are sword techniques and swordsmanship in general as well as FPS games.

name: Himiko Agari
description: Himiko Agari is introduced as a shy insecure girl. She also runs a ramen shop review blog and considers herself a "ramen expert."

name: Isane Kotetsu
description: __Height:__ 187 cm (6'1") Isane Kotetsu, is the lieutenant of the 4th Division, the medical and supply relief division, in Gotei 13 under Captain Retsu Unohana. Isane is the older sister of Kiyone Kotetsu, one of the two 3rd seats in the 13th Division. Unlike Kiyone, she is generally quiet and observant, though she shares her sister's sense of loyalty. She looks to Unohana as a mentor and mother figure. It is noted by Unohana that Isane suffers from frequent and recurring nightmares.

name: Jeremy Agriche
description: Jeremy is childish and very reckless. He gets very angry when someone tries to harm his sister Roxana Agriche. Because he grew up in a loveless house, he craves his older half-sister's affection and gets easily jealous when someone takes her attention away from him.

name: Keiichirou Miyanoshita
description: Keiichirou is Satsuki's young brother. He is easily frightened by many things and is seen crying sometimes, but he shows courage where it counts to help in defeating the ghosts. He creates a special friendship with the ghost Amanojaku.

Rather hot blooded and direct, with a fiery soul and enough compassion to put his own life on the line for his friends.

name: Matoi Tsunetsuki
description: A girl with short, straight-fringed hair who stalks whoever she falls in love with. She is also known for changing her manner of dress to partner those of her current love interest. She falls in love with Nozomu after misinterpreting one of his statements as a confession of love, and follows him wherever he goes, much to his dismay; even dressing up in a kimono similar to Nozomu and performing many of the duties of a Japanese wife (walking three steps behind, always by his side, etc).
